question: Which of the following is the correct order for the electron pair repulsions?
option1: lone pair-lone pair < bond pair-bond pair < bond pair-lone pair
option2: lone pair-lone pair < bond pair-lone pair < bond pair-bond pair
option3: bond pair-bond pair < bond pair-lone pair < lone pair-lone pair

remarks: Correct answer is "bond pair-bond pair < bond pair-lone pair < lone pair-lone pair"
